description: karta harness enforcement for Codex: binder immutability, pack write validation, and the delivery Stop-gate — the subset of karta's Claude Code hooks that Codex's hook surface can express (docs/how-to/codex.md has the full parity table). Referenced by the 'hooks' entry in .codex-plugin/plugin.json. Codex file edits arrive as apply_patch calls whose tool_input.command is the raw patch body; the guard scripts parse that shape natively. Same contract as everywhere else: hook payload JSON on stdin; exit 0 allows, exit 2 blocks with the reason on stderr (the Stop guard also emits the JSON block decision on stdout). Each command is a fail-open launcher: if PLUGIN_ROOT does not resolve to the installed plugin on this Codex build, the hook allows rather than wedging the session.
